name: Shota Kagei
headline: Applied AI Builder | Protective Intelligence, Threat Assessment, and Automation Systems

evidence.text: Built AI automation across recurring intelligence products and reduced production time by 50-87% with zero missed executive-trip deadlines.
Designed and deployed PIMM, a full-stack media-monitoring system processing thousands of articles daily with multi-stage ML/LLM filtering and Slack routing.
Built social intelligence pipeline processing 10,000+ posts per cycle with hybrid ML/LLM classification, threat indicators, and repeat-actor detection.
Created weighted threat scoring logic with 150+ criteria across POI/event/travel domains and embedded it into automated AI-assisted workflows.
Owned end-to-end delivery from ingestion to reporting, including CI/CD workflows, quality checks, and stakeholder-ready outputs.
7+ years in protective intelligence and threat assessment across Shopify, Amazon, and Starbucks, supporting executive protection and security operations.
Reduced access audit time by 98% by mapping processes and automating compliance workflows, while identifying and removing unauthorized access risk.
Increased intelligence reporting output by 41% through SOP design, analyst training, and structured quality improvements in a GSOC environment.
Designed and implemented a weighted multi-domain risk matrix (POI, travel, event) to standardize threat scoring, protection posture, and resource allocation.
Delivered tactical and strategic intelligence products during COVID-era disruption, civil unrest, and geopolitical events to support crisis decision-making.
